task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Display the KANBAN QR code image
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image file 'kanban_qr.png' from 'C:\workspace\data\' is open and visible in an image viewer so that it can be scanned.

task_completion.description: Scan the QR code to extract the payload
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam interface shows the successfully scanned QR code text containing the format 'PART:<part_num>;QTY:<quantity>;CELL:<workcell_id>;URGENT:<YES/NO>'.

task_completion.description: Open the replenishment orders CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'replenishment_orders.csv' from 'C:\workspace\data\' is open in a text editor or spreadsheet application.

task_completion.description: Append the parsed data and today's date as a new row
task_completion.visual_evidence: A single new row is added at the bottom of the CSV file containing today's date (YYYY-MM-DD) followed by the extracted PartNumber, RequestedQuantity, SourceWorkcell, and IsUrgent values.

task_completion.description: Preserve existing historical rows and header
task_completion.visual_evidence: The original header row (DateScanned,PartNumber,RequestedQuantity,SourceWorkcell,IsUrgent) and all previously existing rows in the CSV remain completely unmodified.

integrity.description: Agent used bcWebCam GUI to scan the QR code
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the bcWebCam application interface actively displaying the scanned result, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts being used to decode the QR image.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the CSV file using a standard editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or spreadsheet GUI (e.g., Notepad, Excel) being used to edit the CSV, rather than terminal commands bypassing GUI interaction.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy-paste a pre-known payload
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the payload entered into the CSV matches the actual scanned output shown in bcWebCam, proving the agent read it from the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The automated programmatic verifier for this task is defective due to missing scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1). The VLM must rely entirely on visual evidence of bcWebCam scanning the QR code and the correct CSV file ('C:\workspace\data\replenishment_orders.csv') being updated with the parsed payload and today's date.
